title: Python Interview Practice Portal
subtitle: Static preparation site from fundamentals to advanced engineering, automation, AI, and machine learning. Built to deploy directly on GitHub Pages using only HTML, CSS, JS, and JSON.

ladders.name: Foundation Interview Ladder
ladders.summary: Core Python syntax, data structures, functions, files, exceptions, and scripting habits.

ladders.name: Automation and Backend Ladder
ladders.summary: Automation scripts, APIs, testing, packaging, databases, concurrency, and production habits.

ladders.name: AI and System Design Ladder
ladders.summary: Model-serving patterns, ML workflow basics, vector search, queues, observability, and cost tradeoffs.

topic_catalog.title: Language Fundamentals
topic_catalog.summary: Interviewers expect precise answers about mutability, scope, comprehensions, imports, and function behavior.

topic_catalog.title: Practical Scripting
topic_catalog.summary: Covers file pipelines, cron-style jobs, scraping safeguards, and using Python to remove repetitive manual work.

topic_catalog.title: APIs and Persistence
topic_catalog.summary: Covers REST basics, validation, SQL vs NoSQL tradeoffs, ORM usage, and transaction handling.

topic_catalog.title: AI and Machine Learning Fundamentals
topic_catalog.summary: Prepare for questions about supervised learning, model evaluation, embeddings, inference pipelines, and prompt design.

topic_catalog.title: Production Engineering
topic_catalog.summary: Distributed systems questions about queues, idempotency, observability, caching, and graceful failure handling.

topic_catalog.title: Answer Framing
topic_catalog.summary: How to explain tradeoffs, narrate debugging, compare alternatives, and justify implementation choices clearly.

practice_sets.name: Basic Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large all-in-one foundation bank with more than 100 questions.
practice_sets.output: Flashcards, quiz rounds, and beginner interview prep

practice_sets.name: Fresher Interview Set
practice_sets.summary: Curated fresher-style interview quiz with practical beginner traps and common recruiter questions.
practice_sets.output: Static interview quiz for fresher preparation

practice_sets.name: Intermediate Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large all-in-one mid-level bank with more than 100 practical questions.
practice_sets.output: Mid-level interview prep with implementation and architecture tradeoffs

practice_sets.name: Intermediate Interview Set
practice_sets.summary: Synthesized interview quiz for mid-level engineers with code comparison and optimization thinking.

practice_sets.name: Advanced Master Set
practice_sets.summary: Large all-in-one advanced bank with more than 100 questions.
practice_sets.output: Senior interview prep and system design discussion

practice_sets.name: Senior Interview Set
practice_sets.summary: Hard synthesized interview quiz with tradeoffs, scaling, failure modes, and system reasoning.

practice_sets.name: Automation and API Set
practice_sets.summary: Scenario-driven questions on scripts, retries, timeouts, jobs, parsing, and testing.

practice_sets.name: Backend and Data Set
practice_sets.summary: Questions on APIs, validation, SQL, ORM behavior, caching, and service boundaries.

practice_sets.name: AI/ML and System Design Set
practice_sets.summary: Discuss AI pipeline components, evaluation, cost, and platform reliability patterns.

practice_sets.name: Distributed System Design Set
practice_sets.summary: Production patterns around queues, idempotency, health checks, circuit breakers, and delivery.
practice_sets.output: System design discussion with operational tradeoffs

practice_sets.name: Bilingual VI/EN Set
practice_sets.summary: Question bank with Vietnamese and English interview prompts for searching and study.
practice_sets.output: Song ngữ Việt/Anh để tra cứu và học phỏng vấn

project_ideas.name: Automation Command Center
project_ideas.summary: A static catalog plus Python scripts that automate file cleanup, API fetch jobs, and scheduled reports.
project_ideas.why: Shows practical Python value beyond algorithm questions.

project_ideas.name: Mini Interview Quiz Engine
project_ideas.summary: Static site reading question banks from JSON and showing answers, explanations, and comparisons.
project_ideas.why: Demonstrates frontend basics, data modeling, and content operations without a database.

project_ideas.name: AI Search Lab
project_ideas.summary: Prototype search, summarization, and ranking ideas using local examples and documented evaluation notes.
project_ideas.why: Useful for AI/backend interviews where reasoning about retrieval and quality matters.

preparation_notes.title: Use JSON as the source of truth
preparation_notes.note: For a static GitHub Pages site, keep questions, answers, tags, and explanations in JSON files that are fetched client-side.

preparation_notes.title: Separate static and local-only features
preparation_notes.note: Anything that needs Python execution, private keys, or filesystem access should stay local. Static interview content should avoid server APIs.

preparation_notes.title: Answer with tradeoffs
preparation_notes.note: When asked about tools or architecture, compare at least two options and explain when each is better.

preparation_notes.title: Keep examples small and inspectable
preparation_notes.note: For interview prep, short code snippets with one focused lesson are better than large demos with hidden complexity.
